meta.title: Tying Bow Ties: Using Bow Tie Analysis to Secure ICS
meta.description:
Bow Tie Analysis was brought to the safety community by Shell in the early 90's, but Harry Paul of OSIsoft and Will Price of Cyber Synergetics show this approach can also be used in ICS security analysis. 

Their specific OT example is a Fluid Catalytic Cracking Process. They found an incident that caused a refinery explosion and applied the bow tie analysis to the incident. 

There is also an IT example with a web application. And they combine OT and IT in the bow tie at 34:00.

They begin by discussing HAZOPS / PHA and how Bow Tie Analysis can help consider cyber threats and mitigations in a traditional PHA. Specifically they show how Bow Tie Analysis can:

1. Consider Cyber and Physical Threats Together

2. Visualize Complex Attacks and Corresponding Defenses

3. Applying Bow Tie Analysis to both OT and IT
